{"type":"assistant.message","data":{"content":"Let me walk through a comprehensive refactoring of the data pipeline module.\n\n## Step 1: Extract stages\n\n```python\ndef extract(sources):\n    for source in sources:\n        yield from get_connector(source).read_batches()\n\ndef transform(records):\n    for record in records:\n        yield normalize(record)\n\ndef load(records, target):\n    writer = get_writer(target)\n    for batch in batched(records, 500):\n        writer.write_batch(batch)\n```\n\n## Step 2: Add retry logic\n\n```python\n@retry(stop=stop_after_attempt(3))\ndef resilient_load(records, target):\n    return load(records, target)\n```","outputTokens":312}}
